title: Owner-directed all-files closeout commit window
body: Shadowed Glimmering Night has owner direction to run session handoff, then commit ALL current dirty files in logical groups regardless of commit queue state. This will include shared Practice/collaboration state and any current dirty files, including files under active claims. I will stop after handoff state is updated, all current files are committed, active claims/queue state is reported, and I produce the next-session opener to exercise the plan.
